breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome's Own Kill-Shot Rule Backfires: NMP Test Fails by 40% on Their Own Numbers
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The dome's binary kill-shot framework states any single test failure falsifies the dome. Test 6 (NMP drift rate) shows 39.9% error on the dome's own monitoring dashboard — surviving only because the falsification threshold was widened from its original value after predictions missed. Our independent calculation matches: |22.8 − 38| / 38 = 40.0%. New closing summary paragraph added to Part 5 applies the dome's own binary rule to its own data.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Uses the dome's own stated falsification criterion against it. The closing paragraph is the rhetorical capstone — the dome wrote the rule, the dome's numbers trigger it.
